title: Open news article and verify content
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the TRENDING tab. | Tap on the news article titled 'Dozens take part in North Central video production for Riley fundraiser.'
expected_result: The news article should be fully loaded with the title, image, summary, and advertisement sections. | The article content should match the description provided in the screenshot.

title: Navigate back to the previous screen
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the TRENDING tab. | Tap on the news article titled 'Dozens take part in North Central video production for Riley fundraiser.' | Tap the back arrow in the header to return to the previous screen.
expected_result: The app should navigate back to the TRENDING tab.

title: Verify navigation to other news categories
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the TRENDING tab. | Tap on the back arrow in the header to return to the main news categories screen. | Tap on the NATIONAL tab. | Tap on the POLITICAL tab. | Tap on the ENTERTAINMENT tab.
expected_result: The app should navigate to the respective news categories.

title: Check if the advertisement is clickable
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the TRENDING tab. | Tap on the news article titled 'Dozens take part in North Central video production for Riley fundraiser.' | Tap on the 'Reset Your Body' advertisement.
expected_result: The app should navigate to the advertisement's landing page.

title: Check if the banner ad is clickable
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the TRENDING tab. | Tap on the news article titled 'Dozens take part in North Central video production for Riley fundraiser.' | Tap on the Tropicana probiotics banner ad at the bottom.
expected_result: The app should navigate to the Tropicana probiotics landing page.

title: Check if the back arrow is functional
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the TRENDING tab. | Tap on the news article titled 'Dozens take part in North Central video production for Riley fundraiser.' | Tap the back arrow in the header to return to the previous screen.
expected_result: The app should navigate back to the TRENDING tab.

title: Check if the tabs are functional
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the TRENDING tab. | Tap on the back arrow in the header to return to the main news categories screen. | Tap on the NATIONAL tab. | Tap on the POLITICAL tab. | Tap on the ENTERTAINMENT tab.
expected_result: The app should navigate to the respective news categories.

title: Check if the article content is scrollable
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the TRENDING tab. | Tap on the news article titled 'Dozens take part in North Central video production for Riley fundraiser.' | Scroll up and down the article content.
expected_result: The article content should be scrollable without any issues.
